hero_match.title: New Zealand vs South Africa 3rd T20I
hero_match.user_agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10; K) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36

summary: The New Zealand vs South Africa 3rd T20I is the main event today, with live updates suggesting it is either live or has just finished. There is also a scheduled Chandigarh T20 match. No AFC U20 Asian Cup or Sheffield Shield Final matches are taking place today.
